# Flow Launcher Search UI Reference

Copied from `C:\Users\24045\Desktop\Flow.Launcher` for future PasteBar UI reuse.

Primary entry files:

- `Flow.Launcher/MainWindow.xaml`
- `Flow.Launcher/ResultListBox.xaml`

Included supporting UI assets:

- Flow Launcher themes and base resource dictionaries
- Query/result list converters
- Search window images and artwork
- Search/result view models and plugin result data models needed to understand bindings
- Upstream `LICENSE` and `attribution.md`

This directory is a reference copy. It is not wired into the PasteBar build.
